name: DevOps — Cloud Engineering
description: Gestione infrastruttura multi-cloud con AWS, GCP, Azure, Pulumi e observability avanzata

dotfiles.zshrc_extra:
# AWS
export AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=eu-west-1

# GCP
export GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=$HOME/.gcp/credentials.json

# Pulumi
export PULUMI_HOME=$HOME/.pulumi
export PATH=$PATH:$PULUMI_HOME/bin

# Kubectl
source <(kubectl completion zsh)
alias k=kubectl
complete -F __start_kubectl k

# Terraform
autoload -U +X bashcompinit && bashcompinit
complete -o nospace -C /usr/bin/terraform terraform

welcome_message: Benvenuto nel tuo ambiente Cloud Engineering! AWS CLI, GCP SDK, Azure CLI, Terraform, Pulumi e kubectl sono installati. Stack di monitoring (Prometheus + Grafana) disponibile con 'prom-up'. Configura le credenziali cloud con 'aws configure', 'gcloud auth login' e 'az login'.

recommended_projects.name: Infrastruttura AWS con Terraform
recommended_projects.command: mkdir my-aws-infra && cd my-aws-infra && terraform init

recommended_projects.name: Infrastruttura multi-cloud con Pulumi (TypeScript)
recommended_projects.command: mkdir my-cloud && cd my-cloud && pulumi new typescript
